'''âw-m-f''' ('''kawamaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calcine|calcine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calcine|calcine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-m-f
|-
! Lemma
| kawamaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwamaf|thiwamaf]] || [[word:jiwamaf|jiwamaf]] || [[word:shiwamaf|shiwamaf]] || [[word:kiwamaf|kiwamaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwamaf|thuthuwamaf]] || [[word:jujuwamaf|jujuwamaf]] || [[word:shushuwamaf|shushuwamaf]] || [[word:kukuwamaf|kukuwamaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwamaf|thuwamaf]] || [[word:juwamaf|juwamaf]] || [[word:shuwamaf|shuwamaf]] || [[word:kuwamaf|kuwamaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwamaf|thuwamaf]] || [[word:juwamaf|juwamaf]] || [[word:shuwamaf|shuwamaf]] || [[word:kuwamaf|kuwamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewamaf|thewamaf]] || [[word:jewamaf|jewamaf]] || [[word:shewamaf|shewamaf]] || [[word:kewamaf|kewamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowamaf|thothowamaf]] || [[word:jojowamaf|jojowamaf]] || [[word:shoshowamaf|shoshowamaf]] || [[word:kokowamaf|kokowamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowamaf|thowamaf]] || [[word:jowamaf|jowamaf]] || [[word:showamaf|showamaf]] || [[word:kowamaf|kowamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowamaf|thowamaf]] || [[word:jowamaf|jowamaf]] || [[word:showamaf|showamaf]] || [[word:kowamaf|kowamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwamaf|thĂŠwamaf]] || [[word:jĂŠwamaf|jĂŠwamaf]] || [[word:shĂŠwamaf|shĂŠwamaf]] || [[word:kĂŠwamaf|kĂŠwamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawamaf|thathawamaf]] || [[word:jajawamaf|jajawamaf]] || [[word:shashawamaf|shashawamaf]] || [[word:kakawamaf|kakawamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawamaf|thawamaf]] || [[word:jawamaf|jawamaf]] || [[word:shawamaf|shawamaf]] || [[word:kawamaf|kawamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawamaf|thawamaf]] || [[word:jawamaf|jawamaf]] || [[word:shawamaf|shawamaf]] || [[word:kawamaf|kawamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawamaf|shawamaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawamaf|goshawamaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawamaf|gokishawamaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawamafnĂŒ|shawamafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawamafnknĂŒ|goshawamafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamafnĂŒ|gokishawamafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawamafshĂ«|shawamafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawamafnkshĂ«|goshawamafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawamafshĂ«|gokishawamafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamafro|shawamafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamafnkro|goshawamafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamafro|gokishawamafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamafmu|shawamafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamafnkmu|goshawamafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamafmu|gokishawamafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawamafsher|shawamafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawamafnksher|goshawamafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawamafsher|gokishawamafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawamafng|shawamafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawamafnkng|goshawamafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawamafng|gokishawamafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawamafya|shawamafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawamafnkya|goshawamafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawamafya|gokishawamafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawamafyam|shawamafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawamafnkyam|goshawamafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawamafyam|gokishawamafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawamafnĂŒshĂ«|shawamafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawamafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawamafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawamafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawamafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamafnĂŒro|shawamafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamafnknĂŒro|goshawamafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamafnĂŒro|gokishawamafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamafnĂŒmu|shawamafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamafnknĂŒmu|goshawamafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamafnĂŒmu|gokishawamafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawamafshĂ«nĂŒ|shawamafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawamafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawamafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawamafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamafshĂ«ro|shawamafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamafnkshĂ«ro|goshawamafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamafshĂ«ro|gokishawamafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamafshĂ«mu|shawamafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamafnkshĂ«mu|goshawamafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamafshĂ«mu|gokishawamafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawamafronĂŒ|shawamafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawamafnkronĂŒ|goshawamafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamafronĂŒ|gokishawamafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawamafroshĂ«|shawamafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawamafnkroshĂ«|goshawamafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawamafroshĂ«|gokishawamafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamafromu|shawamafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamafnkromu|goshawamafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamafromu|gokishawamafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawamafmunĂŒ|shawamafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawamafnkmunĂŒ|goshawamafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamafmunĂŒ|gokishawamafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawamafmushĂ«|shawamafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawamafnkmushĂ«|goshawamafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawamafmushĂ«|gokishawamafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamafmuro|shawamafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamafnkmuro|goshawamafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamafmuro|gokishawamafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
